About Vday

We Bridge You to
World-Class Aesthetics

Vday Aesthetic Concierge is a personalized service designed to bridge clients with leading aesthetic clinics in Shanghai. As cosmetic technology and expertise continue to evolve globally, Shanghai has emerged as a key destination for advanced procedures — offering precision, innovation, and refined results.

We curate and coordinate your entire journey, from initial consultation to post-procedure support. Our role is to simplify what can often feel complex, providing clarity, guidance, and seamless execution every step of the way.

At Vday, it's not just about procedures — it's about helping you step into a more confident version of yourself.

Concierge, Not Clinic
We advocate for you, not the clinic.
Vetted Clinics Only
Every clinic passes our quality standards.
End-to-End Support
From airport pickup to aftercare, we're with you.
Transparent Pricing
No hidden fees. No surprises.

Our Procedures

Carefully Curated
Aesthetic Services

Each procedure is managed end-to-end by our concierge team, working with only the finest clinics in Shanghai.

Hair · Scalp Restoration
FUE Hair Transplant

The gold standard in hair restoration — minimally invasive, no linear scarring, natural density that lasts a lifetime.

Ideal for: Men & women with thinning or receding hairlines. Results from 6–12 months.
Dental · Smile Design
Porcelain Veneers

Ultra-thin porcelain shells to correct discoloration, gaps, chips and misalignment — a Hollywood smile, instantly.

Ideal for: Anyone wanting a radiant, flawless smile. Results immediate, lasting 10–15+ years.
Facial · Nose Refinement
Rhinoplasty

Precision nose reshaping for harmony and balance. Both cosmetic refinement and structural correction supported.

Ideal for: Subtle refinement or structural correction. Final result at 6–12 months.
Facial · Eye Rejuvenation
Eyelid Surgery

Blepharoplasty and double eyelid creation for a refreshed, wide-awake look — taking years off your appearance.

Ideal for: Double eyelid creation or anti-aging correction. Recovery in 1–2 weeks.
Body · Contouring
Breast Augmentation

Enhance shape, size, and symmetry using premium silicone implants or fat transfer, personalised to your body.

Ideal for: Women seeking fuller, proportionate contours. Final shape settles in 3–6 months.
Facial · Lip Enhancement
Lip Enhancement

Hyaluronic acid fillers expertly sculpted for natural volume, definition, and the perfect pout — no overdone results.

Ideal for: Subtle plumping or fuller definition. Natural results visible in 3–4 weeks as swelling settles. Minimal downtime.
More Procedures Available

Don't see what you're looking for? We source across all aesthetic specialties in Shanghai. Just ask.

The Destination

Why Shanghai Is the Smart Choice

Shanghai has quietly become one of the world's most sophisticated destinations for aesthetic procedures — combining cutting-edge medical technology with the artistry of specialists who perform these procedures at exceptional volume and precision.

Plan My Trip →
🔬
Advanced Technology
Access to the latest equipment and techniques — often ahead of other global markets in adoption and refinement.
👨‍⚕️
High-Volume Specialists
Surgeons who perform thousands of procedures a year develop precision and fluency that experience alone builds.
🏥
World-Class Clinics
Internationally accredited facilities built to the highest standards of safety, hygiene, and patient experience.
✈️
Travel-Friendly
Combine your procedure with a luxurious Shanghai experience — accessible from anywhere in the world.
How It Works

Your Journey, Simplified

We handle every detail so you focus on your transformation with confidence and calm.

1
Consultation

Share your goals via WhatsApp. We assess your needs and match you to the right clinic and surgeon.

2
Assessment

Receive a personalised procedure plan with outcomes, cost breakdown, and timeline.

3
Planning

We arrange accommodation, clinic appointments, airport pickup, and coordinate your full itinerary.

4
Procedure

Arrive with confidence. Our team accompanies you every step, from airport to clinic and back.

5
Aftercare

Ongoing support post-procedure. We coordinate follow-ups and address concerns remotely.

FAQ

Your Questions,
Answered

Is it safe to get procedures done in Shanghai?
Yes. We only partner with accredited, internationally certified clinics. All surgeons are board-certified specialists. Safety and quality are our non-negotiables.
Who are the doctors performing procedures?
We work with a curated network of leading Shanghai surgeons — many internationally trained. You receive full doctor profiles and credentials before committing to anything.
What is the typical recovery time?
Recovery varies depending on the procedure and the individual. Rather than give a general estimate, we encourage you to reach out to our team directly — we'll give you a realistic timeline based on your specific procedure and lifestyle.
Why choose Shanghai over local clinics?
Shanghai's top aesthetic clinics operate at exceptional volume with the latest technology, attracting specialists who develop a level of precision that is hard to match. We give you access to that expertise, with full concierge support from start to finish.
Do I need to speak Mandarin?
Not at all. Vday handles all communications and translation. Our bilingual concierge team will be your voice throughout the entire process.
What's included in the concierge fee?
Clinic matching, consultation coordination, travel planning, on-ground accompaniment, translation, and post-procedure follow-up.
Still Have Questions?

Talk to Us Directly

Our concierge team typically responds within 2 hours. No commitment required — just a friendly conversation about your goals.
